title: athanasia juncea
intro: Athanasia juncea, also known as wormwood or artemisia, is a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family native to Europe and Asia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Athanasia juncea include relief from digestive issues, such as indigestion and bloating, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, with herbal preparations often involving infusions of the leaves and flowers in hot water or a combination of the plant with other herbs in a decoction.
